name: Curry Halibut Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped onions to the pan and sauté until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Stir in curry powder, stirring for an additional minute.
4. Mix in cream of chicken soup, plain yogurt, milk, and lemon juice.
5. Gently fold in the cooked and flaked halibut.
6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes over low heat until heated through.
7. Serve over rice or noodles. Garnish with tomato slices and parsley, or chopped unsalted peanuts, currants, and chutney.
8. Serves 4-6 (depending on serving portions).
